code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Hubi haddii URL-ga bartilmaameed ee la bixiyay uu ku jiro domain-ka la bixiyay.
Haddii ay sidaas tahay, soo celi URL-ga bartilmaameed si loogu wareejiyo; haddii kale, u isticmaal URL-ga domain-ka si loogu wareejiyo.
Isticmaal protocol-ka https.

Tusaalooyin:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: String-ka URL-ga bartilmaameed.
@param domain: String-ka domain-ka, aan lahayn protocol.

@return String-ka URL-ga loogu talagalay wareejinta.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided redirect URL is within the given domain.
If it is, return the redirect URL for forwarding; otherwise, use the domain URL for forwarding.
Use the https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The redirect URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The intended redirect URL string.

    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: String-ka URL-ga bartilmaameed.
@param domain: String-ka domain-ka, aan lahayn protocol.

@return String-ka URL-ga ee u diyaar garowga.

prompt_1_segments:
Kaydi macluumaadka la bixiyay gudaha khariidadda madaxa jawaabta jira ee hoos ku xusan nooca.
Fankishani wuxuu tixgelinayaa noocyada macluumaadka soo socda: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Waxaa lagu kaydinayaa sida furaha 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', iyo 'Cache-Control', si tartiib ah.
Haddii nooca macluumaadka la sheegay uu sax yahay, madaxa jawaabta cusub waa inuu lahaadaa. Haddii wax khalad ah dhaco, fankishani waa inay soo celisaa madaxa asliga ah iyada oo aan wax beddelin.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Save the provided information into the response header object of the type specified below.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are saved as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
If the specified information type is valid, the new response header should contain it. If an error occurs, this function should return the original header unchanged.

Xogta la bixiyay ku kaydi khariidadda madaxa jawaabta jira ee hoos ku xusan nooca.

std::string create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: shaqada si ay u fuliso amar shell ah oo ay qabato soo saariddiisa; mas'uulka waa kan uu bixiyo xusuusta; HA U BAANIN inaad sameyso shaqadan maxaa yeelay waxaa la siin doonaa marka dambe (laakiin ku dhawaaq halkan si aad u isticmaasho).

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, soo saar iyadoo loo adeegsanayo qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string ah.
Hints: fuli amarro shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaabka DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faylka waqtiga loo kaydiyo qaabka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga loo kaydiyo qaabka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl waqti gaar ah oo loogu talagalay faylka qaabka DSA.

@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: A function to execute a shell command and capture its output; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT implement this function as it will be provided later (but declare it here for use).

Generate a DSA private key, output it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: Execute shell commands to output the DSA parameter file and the DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <parameter file> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <parameter file>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

Soo saar fura DSA gaar ah, u soo saar adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka PEM, oo ku soo celi sida string ah.
Hikradaha: fuli amarro shell si aad u soo saarto faylka qaabka DSA iyo fura DSA gaar ah sida soo socota:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayl waqtiga ah si loo keydiyo qaabka> <dhererka furaha>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo keydinayo qaabka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl waqtiga ah oo gaar ah faylka qaabka DSA.
@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.

2. `openssl gendsa <faylka waqtiga ah ee loo keydinayo qaabka>`
Waxaad isticmaali kartaa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` si aad u sameyso magac fayl waqtiga ah oo gaar ah faylka qaabka DSA.
@return Fura DSA gaar ah ee la soo saaray qaabka PEM, ama NULL haddii khalad dhacay.
prompt_5_bt_segments_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; the user is responsible for freeing the returned memory; DO NOT implement this function because the next one will be provided (but declare it here for use).

Generate a specific DSA key, output it using PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to output the DSA parameter file and the specific DSA key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store the format> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file storing the format>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.
@return The generated DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

/**
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
*/
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
